uncommittedAtMissionStart: app/assets/phantomplay/*.svg (20 new untracked cover assets, pre-existing, not mission work)
baselineNotes.uncommittedWorkPolicy: Preserved, not discarded, not touched by Relay. Presumed in-progress work from a concurrent session per this repo's established concurrent-session convention (CLAUDE.md).
baselineNotes.verifyLiveAdmin: PASSED at mission start (npm run verify:live-admin -> LIVE ADMIN VERIFY PASSED, build phantom-live-20260721-8)
baselineNotes.shipScript: scripts/ship-live-admin.mjs (npm run ship:live-admin) — bumps build id, runs gates, commits, pushes origin/main, verifies live URLs. Relay-only per this repo's CLAUDE.md.
baselineNotes.authSystem: server/src/access/session.ts — multi-provider (demo/prisma-dev/owner-production/gateway-forwarded/database). Production auth provider configured via PHANTOMFORCE_AUTH_PROVIDER.
